TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: lalu na alang mu ga Pyahow . kyan hlahuy, kyan llyung uy. hlahuy ga 'san ta mluyak ro halan ta mnayang ro muhi ngahi, halan ta tmubux lmyun ro mhi llamu na rami nni'un ta uy. llyung ga 'san ta mema 'bagan, bley ci skiyap ta bolung ro 'cyux tayal uy. myasa ci alang mu. ksli' cu ci myanux alang mu che, p'asun cyoli' baley mwah mtisal alang mu uy.
S.PHON: lalu na alaŇč mu …£a pjańßow . kjan ńßlańßuj, kjan lljuŇč uj. ńßlańßuj …£a Ēs~…ēan ta mlujak ro ńßalan ta mnajaŇč ro muńßi Ňčańßi, ńßalan ta tmuő≤ux lmjun ro mńßi llamu na rami nni Ēun ta uj. lljuŇč …£a Ēs~…ēan ta mema Ēő≤a…£an, ő≤lej ¶~ ®i s~…ēkijap ta ő≤oluŇč ro Ē ¶~ ®jux tajal uj. mjas~…ēa ¶~ ®i alaŇč mu. ks~…ēli Ē ¶~ ®u ¶~ ®i mjanux alaŇč mu ¶~ ®ńße, p Ēas~…ēun ¶~ ®joli Ē ő≤alej mwańß mtis~…ēal alaŇč mu uj.
S.FORM: lalu na alang mu ga Pyahow . kyan hlahuy, kyan llyung uy. hlahuy ga 'san ta mluyak ro halan ta mnayang ro muhi ngahi, halan ta tmubux lmyun ro mhi llamu na rami nni'un ta uy. llyung ga 'san ta mema 'bagan, bley ci skiyap ta bolung ro 'cyux tayal uy. myasa ci alang mu. ksli' cu ci myanux alang mu che, p'asun cyoli' baley mwah mtisal alang mu uy.
